headline: Chips Lead Nasdaq 100 Rebound, Oracle Sinks 11%: Stock Market Today
summary: The S&P 500 gained 0.5% while the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 rose 1.1% by midday Thursday, extending a rebound from one-month lows.
